title: Audi Illustrations
summary: We illustrated posters as a gift to our clients and won 8 awards, including Gold National Addy
overview: We wanted to thank our Audi clients for a year of brave briefs.
approach: We decided to each illustrate posters exploring the history of Audi. I chose a vintage approach, illustrating their V16 Streamliner and Type D Grand D Prix Wagen. We handmade the tubes and branded them with Audi logos to send to them.
outcome: Our clients loved them and asked for extra prints. They were so well received we won countless awards including Gold National Addy and were featured in Lürzer's Archive's 200 Best Illustrators.
